name: Emission Line Ratio Map of the Eagle Nebula
description: Create a [SII]/H-alpha emission line ratio map from narrowband Hubble Space Telescope images of the Eagle Nebula (M16) located in ~/AstroImages/eagle_ratio/. Divide the [SII] image (673nmos.fits) by the H-alpha image (656nmos.fits) to generate a 32-bit floating point output. Save the ratio map as ~/AstroImages/eagle_ratio/sii_ha_ratio.fits and record its pixel statistics (minimum, maximum, median, and standard deviation) in ~/AstroImages/eagle_ratio/ratio_statistics.txt.
